name: Table
description: Data table (Figma 541:4024, component set 474:1795). Wraps native table semantics inside a 1px gray.20 outer frame with gray.10 left-aligned headers: grid rounds the frame (radius 8) and adds per-cell rules for dense comparison, horizon stays square with row rules only. Row states: normal, hover (gray.5), pressed (gray.10), disabled (gray.10 with muted text). Row selection is composed with Checkbox cells.

slots.name: tbody
slots.description: Body rows: native tbody/tr/td markup. Mark unavailable rows with data-disabled.

states.name: selected
states.description: Checked rows share the pressed fill; mark them with data-selected on the tr.

limitations: Ships as podo-table CSS classes on native table markup; a shadow-DOM element would break table semantics.
React Native has no table layout; use FlatList/SectionList.

accessibility.focusManagement: Interactive cells manage their own focus.
